papers_mined.title: Uli design (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Igbo S.E. Nigeria women-applied body designs from Uli pod juice; patterns turn black via body heat reaction; fade within ~1 week; ephemeral by design.

papers_mined.title: Speaking Bodies Uli Body Designs Igbo EMKP
papers_mined.note: Ephemeral nature is defining characteristic; fade after a week; wall designs wash off in rainy season.

papers_mined.title: Pitt Rivers Museum Body Arts Uli designs
papers_mined.note: Curvilinear linear forms with sharp pointed instruments dipped in Uli liquid; women practitioners central to process.

papers_mined.title: Reviving Uli Dying Body Art Communa Magazine
papers_mined.note: Free-hand motifs and patterns drawn by women; transient body design tradition facing extinction.

papers_mined.title: Null-LoRA Low-Rank Adaptation Null Space 2025/12
papers_mined.note: Fine-tuning update constrained orthogonal to pre-trained weight direction; null space initialization with adaptive ranks per layer.

papers_mined.title: OPLoRA Orthogonal Projection LoRA Prevents Catastrophic Forgetting 2510.13003
papers_mined.note: Double-sided orthogonal projections; LoRA updates lie entirely in orthogonal spaces from SVD-decomposed frozen weights.

papers_mined.title: LUNE Efficient LLM Unlearning via LoRA Fine-Tuning Negative Examples 2512.07375
papers_mined.note: Lightweight framework for negative-only unlearning via LoRA adapter updates; localizes edits, avoids global changes.

papers_mined.title: Controlled Low-Rank Adaptation Subspace ACL 2025
papers_mined.note: CLoRA — constrains direction of null space of updating matrix via pre-defined subspace orthogonal regularization.
